    About me

    I am a researcher developing novel approaches around mass spectrometry and ion mobility spectrometry to explore chemistry in new ways, currently at the Organic Synthesis & Mass Spectrometry Lab at the University of Mons (Belgium).

    Research interests

    Mass spectrometry Ion mobility spectrometry Organic Chemistry Reaction mechanisms and dynamics

    Career

    2023 – present

    Chargé de Recherches, FNRS

    S2MOS Lab · University of Mons, Belgium

    2022 – 2023

    Postdoctoral Researcher

    Huck Group · Radboud University, Nijmegen

    2020 – 2022

    Postdoctoral Researcher

    Roithová Group · Radboud University, Nijmegen

    2016 – 2020

    Aspirant FNRS — PhD Student

    S2MOS Lab · University of Mons · supervised by Pascal Gerbaux & Jérôme Cornil

    Contact
